title: Sony faces strong criticism after ending production of physical discs for PlayStation
summary: Politicians, studios, and the gaming community react with outrage to Sony's cessation of physical game manufacturing, while GOG and GitHub take the opportunity to defend the right to software ownership.

title: Cyberpunk 2077 surpasses 40 million copies sold after successful redemption
summary: CD Projekt Red celebrates a new sales milestone for its sci-fi RPG, consolidating its impressive recovery since the troubled original launch.

title: Valve's Steam Machines suffer the dreaded 'Red Line of Death' reminiscent of Xbox 360
summary: The first hardware failures in Valve's Steam Machine consoles recall the classic Xbox 360 red ring of death, causing concern among early users.

title: Sandfall Interactive defends the imperfect design of Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
summary: The creators of the acclaimed RPG assert that success will not change their development philosophy, prioritizing artistic vision over technical perfection to avoid boring players.

title: Development of Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League nearly led to complete team collapse
summary: The game's director and several developers reveal the harsh creative process behind the failed live-service title, describing an atmosphere of extreme exhaustion and frustration.

title: Robert Henrysson resigns as CEO of Supermassive Games after more than a decade
summary: The top executive of the studio responsible for Until Dawn and The Dark Pictures leaves his position in a time of low profitability and release saturation.

title: Global RAM crisis forces developers and manufacturers to implement alternative solutions
summary: While Cinder City reduces its memory requirements due to player complaints, Meta turns to custom engineering to circumvent the DDR5 chip shortage.

title: David Gaider and Palantir CEO harshly criticize the direction of current artificial intelligence
summary: The former lead writer of Dragon Age labels generative AI a plague, while the Palantir executive angrily questions the token-based business model.

title: Bandai Namco announces the future of the Dragon Ball Xenoverse saga with new downloadable content
summary: The company reveals the next steps for the series, including the release of the fourth chapter of the Future Saga for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2.

title: Analysts debate the price of the future PlayStation 6 and whether it could reach $1,000
summary: An opinion piece on GamesIndustry explores the possible features and value that Sony's next console would need to offer to justify such a high price.

title: Netflix announces official release date for the second part of Steel Ball Run
summary: The anime adaptation of the seventh installment of JoJo's Bizarre Adventure will have its continuation, with its release date finally confirmed by the platform.

title: A new Solo Leveling movie will hit theaters before the premiere of season 3
summary: The successful anime franchise expands its universe with a feature film that will serve as a bridge to the third season of the main series.

title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle announces its streaming release date for July 2026
summary: The long-awaited adaptation of the final arc of Tanjiro's story will arrive on digital platforms this coming July, according to the official announcement.

title: Shigeru Miyamoto wants to expand his creations beyond Nintendo video games
summary: The legendary creator of Mario and Zelda expresses his desire to bring new characters and franchises to other media such as film and television.

title: Nintendo promises to maintain its firm stance against intellectual property infringement, with or without AI
summary: The Japanese company reaffirms its uncompromising position on unauthorized use of its characters, regardless of whether the infringements are generated by artificial intelligence.

title: Expansion pass leaked for Final Fantasy 7 Revelation that would close the trilogy
summary: Store listings suggest that Square Enix plans an extensive downloadable content package to give a definitive conclusion to the Final Fantasy VII remake series.

title: Relic Entertainment announces a new Company of Heroes strategy game
summary: The studio reveals a real-time strategy title with roguelite mechanics, designed for genre fans who don't have long hours to play.

title: Rust's Common Ground update adds a brutalist apartment rental system
summary: The popular multiplayer survival game introduces new social dynamics with the possibility of renting apartments and shops, where players must pay daily rent to relentless landlords.

title: EVE Online studio Fenris releases the source code of its graphics engine
summary: Fulfilling a years-long promise, the company makes its proprietary technology available to the community, allowing independent developers to access a high-level tool.

title: New The Sims 4 update reduces annoying notifications and improves gameplay experience
summary: Players can finally silence their in-game phone and enjoy fewer interruptions, including a reduction in visits from the Grim Reaper.
